visual_description: A medium close-up shot captures a man and a woman sitting side-by-side in what appears to be a bustling diner or food court. The woman, on the left, has voluminous, curly blonde hair and is wearing a dark, ribbed sweater. She holds a sandwich in her hands, looking toward the man with a slightly concerned or questioning expression. The man, on the right, has dark, wavy hair and a mustache. He is dressed in a striped sweater and is also holding a sandwich. He looks at the woman, his mouth slightly open as if he is speaking. The background is filled with the indistinct chatter and activity of other patrons, creating a lively, public atmosphere. The camera remains steady, focusing on the interaction between the two main subjects. A woman begins to speak in a slightly hesitant, questioning tone, as if searching for the right words, saying, "Because they..." A man immediately interjects with a calm and affirmative voice, confirming her thought, "Yes, because they..." The background is filled with the low, ambient murmur of a busy public space, like a restaurant or food court, with the faint, indistinct chatter of other people nearby.
